user_query:
You're acting as our architecture decision recorder for an internal developer platform initiative. Read both input/context.md and input/adr-0008-internal-nginx-gateway.md. Then produce a small ADR set and index under output/docs/adr/ as follows:

1) Copy the existing accepted ADR into output/docs/adr/0008-internal-nginx-gateway.md without changing its content or status.

2) Create a new deprecation/superseding ADR using the Deprecation ADR style at output/docs/adr/0021-deprecate-internal-nginx-gateway.md. Requirements:
- Status: Accepted
- Clearly state "Supersedes ADR-0008" near the top
- Include a "Migration Plan" with 4 or more concrete, ordered steps
- Include a "Lessons Learned" section with at least 3 points

3) Create a Standard ADR choosing an API versioning approach at output/docs/adr/0011-api-versioning-strategy.md. Requirements:
- Status: Accepted
- Sections: Context, Decision, Consequences with Positive/Negative/Risks subsections
- Make a clear choice between header-based or URL-based versioning and justify it based on the context file

4) Create a Full ADR deciding inter-service communication at output/docs/adr/0016-service-communication.md (e.g., gRPC vs REST vs async messaging). Requirements:
- Use a full, major-decision style with sections: Context, Decision Drivers, Considered Options (at least 3 options, each with Pros/Cons), Decision, Rationale, Consequences (Positive/Negative/Risks), Implementation Notes
- Choose one option and justify it based on the constraints and drivers in input/context.md

5) Create an ADR index at output/docs/adr/README.md with a Markdown table header "| ADR | Title | Status | Date |" and four rows linking to each ADR (e.g., [0011](0011-api-versioning-strategy.md)). Use ISO dates (YYYY-MM-DD). Also include a short "Creating a New ADR" section with three bullet steps.

Conventions and constraints:
- Maintain ADR lifecycle conventions; do not alter the accepted ADR content in 0008.
- Use the exact filenames and numbers above; keep titles kebab-case aligned to filenames.
- Keep each ADR to roughly 1–2 pages.
- Ensure the deprecation ADR explicitly references and supersedes ADR-0008.

Deliver all files only under output/docs/adr/ with the exact paths specified.
